# sui-pilot

> Documentation copilot for AI agents working with Sui blockchain, Walrus storage, Seal secrets management, and the Sui TypeScript SDK.

This repository contains 548 documentation files across four ecosystems, designed for AI agent consumption.

## Docs

- [Full File Index](agents/sui-pilot-agent.md): Embedded pipe-delimited index (inside the `<!-- AGENTS-MD-START -->` / `<!-- AGENTS-MD-END -->` markers) of every doc file, organized by ecosystem
- [Sui blockchain docs](.sui-docs/): 336 MDX files — concepts, guides, references, standards
- [Walrus storage docs](.walrus-docs/): 84 MDX files — blob storage, Walrus Sites, SDK, operators
- [Seal secrets docs](.seal-docs/): 14 MDX files — encryption, key servers, access control
- [TypeScript SDK docs](.ts-sdk-docs/): 114 MDX files — dapp-kit, payment-kit, kiosk, React hooks, transactions

## How to Use

Read `agents/sui-pilot-agent.md` first. Between the index markers near the top of the prompt body you will find a compact, parseable index of every documentation file organized by ecosystem and directory structure. Search the appropriate `.{ecosystem}-docs/` directory for detailed content.

## Important

Your training data about Sui Move is likely outdated. Always search and read these docs before generating Sui, Move, Walrus, Seal, or Sui TypeScript SDK code.
